Leaving aside the question of consciousness, the Ted Chiang piece has a reasonable point about moral atrophy if you let AI make choices.

But it is also interesting in light of the fact that repeated randomized trials find AI is apparently a good ethicist. https://t.co/FdUWyMutsp https://t.co/VycwxbzzrK

最近学到的无用但有趣的冷知识

我们现在用的终端，全称是终端模拟器 terminal emulator

等一下，为什么叫模拟器？

终端模拟器之所以得名，是因为它们最初是模仿独立计算机终端的程序，而这些终端是通过线缆连接至主机的专用显示器和键盘设备的。

所以今天的 TUI/GUI 之争，其实就是皮肤的 taste https://t.co/IwN5Fzacwi

RT @godofprompt: For a year, every AI account on this app has said the same thing: "Hollywood is cooked. Anyone can make a movie now."

The…

AI 3D just got way harder to ignore.

Before: cool front view, cursed backside.
Now: 1M-polygon models in seconds, cleaner 360° textures, and high-detail geometry that can hit 10M+ polygons.

Rodin Gen-2.5 is not a tiny upgrade.

The crazy part is speed.

Rodin can generate 1M-polygon models in as little as 4 seconds.

That means you can explore ideas almost instantly instead of waiting forever for one output that may not even work. https://t.co/SnrV4lcUwv

But it’s not just fast.

You can control the quality window:

4s for rough drafts
20s for balanced assets
40s for richer structure
80s for extreme detail

At the top end, it can preserve tiny surface details like skin microstructures. https://t.co/dJATeoYLp8

The texture upgrade matters even more.

Most AI 3D tools collapse when you inspect the model.

Rodin’s new 3D-native texture system gives full 360° coverage, better surface faithfulness, and PBR materials that look more usable in real pipelines. https://t.co/ZgIN1EdXNs

And with parallel batch generation, you can create multiple directions at once instead of gambling on one result.

But for faster ideation, props, concepts, and production workflows?

This is the kind of AI upgrade people actually use.

Try Hyper3D Rodin Gen-2.5:

正式开源 html-video 🚀 html版剪映来了！

你的 Agent 现在可以通过写 html轻松做出世界级水准的产品宣传、知识解说视频，成本极低！🔥

历时 3 天，3 万行代码！支持20多套顶尖视频风格模板，分页编辑，mp4 导出，支持包括Claude Code、Codex、hermes、cursor等主流 Agent接入即用💥地址见评论区 https://t.co/jsgztt2j32

1）html-video 项目基于 hyperframes 框架构建， @HyperFrames_  ，Apache 2.0 开源，由 Open Design 团队原班人马打造
repo 地址👉https://t.co/x0AgNRKysb

@HyperFrames_ 3）html-video 支持分页预览、分页编辑和帧文字编辑，修改视频更快更方便，不用每改一次就要导出一次看效果

同步支持 横屏16:9 / 视频9:16 / 方形 1:1 / 小红书 4:5 等多种视频尺寸 https://t.co/MIfdhKVeiq

@HyperFrames_ 4）html-video 自动识别本地 6 种 code agent cli——Codex、Claude Code、hermes、cursor agent...顶部栏一键切换，无需额外配置任何 API key

没有本地 Agent 的用户也可以直接使用官方AMR接入 https://t.co/Ffe3pmkOAS
@HyperFrames_ 5）html-video 已接入 Minimax @MiniMax_AI  ，支持直接根据视频内容生成配音和配乐 https://t.co/jkt2cPvieN

HyperFrames is what got us hooked on the "agent writes HTML, ffmpeg renders MP4" loop. We ended up building html-video on top of it — same DNA, just a studio + CLI wrapped around the workflow. Open-sourced today.

Huge thanks to @HeyGen 🙏

https://t.co/VPhe4Mekyb

html-video 已经支持上传 @HeyGen 最新推出的 frames.md 来定义视频运动规范🔥，同时也支持通过design.md 定义视觉风格

本地 Coding Agent 接入即用👉https://t.co/x0AgNRKysb

后面几天持续分享用 html-video 做的案例
欢迎大家一起分享
以及你想加入哪些模板，欢迎提 PR 和留言
https://t.co/pHyoKUSQG4
